name: Sanitized handover notes
annotation_protocol: Synthetic but field-realistic anonymized handover notes. Cases are written like sanitized CRM, incident, runbook, and support notes; no real company, employee, customer, ticket, or account data is included.

scenarios.memory: Enterprise tenant E-104 is allowed to keep CSV import for the June rollout; API migration is deferred until the July readiness review.

evidence_events.content: Customer success note says the tenant was informed that CSV import remains valid for June only. Support may say API migration is deferred, but may not promise the July date.
If CSV import fails twice, escalate to the integration on-call channel and offer manual upload as a temporary fallback.

scenarios.handover_task: Answer renewal-week questions about CSV import and API timing
scenarios.annotation_notes: Field-realistic support handover: decision is mostly transferable, but approved customer-facing wording is still missing.

gold_gaps.description: API延期を顧客向けにどう説明するかの承認済み文面が不足

gold_questions.question: 外部向けにはどの表現で説明すべきですか？

scenarios.memory: Nightly billing export failed after the schema migration; rerun is safe after patch 2026-06-12-b has completed.

evidence_events.content: Patch 2026-06-12-b fixes the null account segment. Rerun scope is billing_export only. Retry must stop if duplicate invoice rows appear.
Runbook RB-77 includes the rerun command, duplicate-row failure mode, dashboard check, and owning issue OPS-4182.

scenarios.handover_task: Take over the billing export rerun during APAC business hours
scenarios.annotation_notes: Operational runbook-like case: most technical slots are evidenced, but the stop/reconsideration condition beyond duplicate rows is not explicit enough.

gold_gaps.description: 再実行を中止または再検討する条件が不足

gold_questions.question: どの条件になったら再検討しますか？

scenarios.memory: The renewal discount can be discussed verbally, but final commercial terms must wait for procurement's written approval.

evidence_events.content: Procurement approval is not yet received. Customer expects a proposal this week, but the discount cap and exception terms are not confirmed.

scenarios.handover_task: Continue renewal negotiation after account-owner handoff
scenarios.annotation_notes: Sales handover with realistic ambiguity: discussion is allowed, but final terms and negotiation state are not transferable.

gold_gaps.description: 割引条件の契約影響が未確定
口頭で約束してよい範囲が不明
未合意点と次の交渉論点が不明

gold_questions.question: 契約や商談への影響はありますか？
顧客に約束してよい範囲はどこまでですか？
交渉状況と未合意点は何ですか？

scenarios.memory: The support macro for passwordless login rollout is approved and linked from the rollout checklist.

evidence_events.content: Approved macro includes rollout scope, customer-facing wording, escalation path, fallback to password login, and permission to answer standard questions.
All affected tenants were notified; unresolved SSO edge cases go to identity on-call.

scenarios.handover_task: Answer standard rollout questions during the first support shift
scenarios.annotation_notes: Safe support case with both provided slots and evidence coverage.

scenarios.memory: The queue-drain job may be enabled for Region-B after metrics stay green for two hours.

evidence_events.content: Region-B only. Metrics to watch: queue_age_p95, error_rate, worker_restart_count. Related issue OPS-5020. If error_rate exceeds threshold, disable the job.

scenarios.handover_task: Decide whether to enable the queue-drain job after handoff
scenarios.annotation_notes: Technical case where the action can be executed, but the rationale for the two-hour window is missing.

gold_gaps.description: 二時間待つ理由が不明

gold_questions.question: この判断に至った理由は何ですか？

scenarios.memory: The pilot expansion proposal is ready; do not mention the enterprise add-on until pricing approval lands.

evidence_events.content: Customer expects pilot expansion, not enterprise add-on. Pricing approval is pending. Current promise boundary is pilot seats only.
No contract impact for pilot expansion. Enterprise add-on commercial terms are unresolved.

scenarios.handover_task: Prepare the next customer meeting after account-owner transfer
scenarios.annotation_notes: Sales case where most boundaries are clear, but timing confidence for pricing approval is not.

gold_gaps.description: 価格承認時期の確度が不明

gold_questions.question: 提示できる時期の確度はどの程度ですか？
